---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Type
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Enhancement to existing skill
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Tool/utility
- [ ] Other

## Description
Clear description of what you'd like to see added.

## Use Case
What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## Proposed Solution
If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Industry/Domain
Which industry or domain is this relevant to?
- [ ] General finance
- [ ] Oil & Gas
- [ ] Banking
- [ ] Insurance
- [ ] Manufacturing
- [ ] Crypto
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context
Any other information, examples, or references.
